free_text: Be-7 Production Cross Sections in N, C, B-11 and B-10
With 740-MeV Protons.
Last checking has been done.
DATE is corrected
Sandwiches 3.81 cm in Diameter, Consisting of a Target
Powder Compressed Into Self-Supporting Disk were Used.
The Target Powders were-Natural Boron (80.4% B-11 AND
10.6% B-10 WITH APPROX. 0.6% IMPURITY, 0.57 G/CM**2
THICK), Boron Enriched with B-10 (92.01% B-10 AND 7.99%
B-11 WITH APPROX. 5% IMPURITY, 0.44 G/CM**2 THICK),
Boron Nitride (99% BN WITH APPROX. 1% IMPURITY, 0.60
G/CM**2 THICK).The Beam Monitors were Polystyrene
Disks 2 mm Thick 0.21 g/cm**2.
A 20.3 cm Diam.*10.2 cm Thick NaI(Tl)Crystal.
A 10 cm**3 Planar Ge(Li) Detector.Resolution
Fwhm=2.2-KeV at 478 KeV.
The 184-In. Cyclotron at Lawrence
Berkeley Laboratory.
*by Authors* the Corrections on Be-7 Decay Fit, Be-7
Buildup in Target from Fasr Secondary Protons, Counting
Efficiency, Target Alignment During Irradiation,
Absorption in Target of Be-7 Radiations, Heavy Element
In Monitor Foil, C-N-O Contamination in Monitor  Foil,
Be-7 Yield For Boron Azid is Presented Too.
ThisWork.
/by Authors/.The N(P,X)Be-7 Cross Section Relative to
The Two Monitor Reactions was Measured.
.The Final Cross Section Value is the Average
Of the Two Monitor Results.  As the Errors are
Dependent the Author Pessimistically Average the Error
Of the Two Monitor Results to Form the Final Error.
ThisWork.
/by Authors/.The B-0(P,X)Be-7 Cross Section were
Measured Relative to the C(P,X)C-11 and C(P,X)Be-7
Monitor Reactions.
.The Final Cross Section Value is the Average
Of the Two Monitor Results.  As the Errors are
Dependent the Author Pessimistically Average the Error
Of the Two Monitor Results to Form the Final Error.
ThisWork.
/by Authors/.The B-11(P,X)Be-7 Cross Section were
Measured Relative to the C(P,X)C-11 and C(P,X)Be-7
Monitor Reactions.
.The Final Cross Section Value is the Average
Of the Two Monitor Results.  As the Errors are
Dependent the Author Pessimistically Average the Error

ThisWork.
/by Authors/.The B-10(P,X)Be-7 Cross Section were
Measured Relative to the C(P,X)C-11 and C(P,X)Be-7
Monitor Reactions.
- By Compiler - A Discrepance For the Datum is Obtained
Among Table 3 (6.28) And Table 4 (6.31)
.The Final Cross Section Value is the Average
Of the Two Monitor Results.  As the Errors are
Dependent the Author Pessimistically Average the Error
